entries.question: Omuyambi ayinza atya okutandika emboozi ey'omugaso?
entries.answer: Gyebale ko. Ndi wano okukuyamba. Buuza ku busubuzi, bulimi, nsimbi, mirimu, bulamu, bukugu bwa ssimu, okutunda ku mutimbagano, oba obuyambi bw'ekibiina, nja kuddamu mu mitendera egyangu.

entries.question: Ntandika ntya obusubuzi obutono?
entries.answer: Tandika n'ekyetaago abantu kye balina okumpi naawe. Londa ekintu oba empeereza emu ennyangu, bala ssente z'osaasaanya, teekawo bbeeyi ey'obwenkanya, gezaako ku bakasitoma abatono, era wandiika buli kutunda n'ensaasaanya nga tonnagaziya.

entries.question: Biwandiiko ki bye nsaanidde okukuuma mu busubuzi?
entries.answer: Kuuma akatabo oba note mu ssimu eraga ssente eziyingira, ezifuluma, stock eguliddwa, stock etundiddwa, amabanja, ne oda za bakasitoma. Bikebere buli wiiki omanye oba ofuna amagoba.

entries.question: Nnyinza ntya okutereka ssente nga nfuna ntono?
entries.answer: Buli lw'ofuna ssente, terekako akatono ne bwe kaba katono. Yawula ssente za waka ku za busubuzi, wandiika ebyetaago nga tonnasaasaanya, weewale amabanja agatetaagisa, era kozesa ekibiina ky'okutereka ekesigika bwe kibaawo.

entries.question: Nkozesa ntya mobile money mu bukuumi?
entries.answer: Kuuma PIN yo nga ya kyama, kakasa ennamba nga tonnasindika, togaba koodi ezikujjira omulundi gumu, era weegendereze obubaka obugamba nti owangudde ssente. Bw'osindika ku nnamba enkyamu, tuukirira kampuni mangu.

entries.question: Nnalonda ntya ebirime ebisinga mu kitundu kyange?
entries.answer: Londa ebirime ebigendera ku sizoni, ettaka, amazzi g'olina, n'akatale akali okumpi. Tandika ku kitundu kitono, buuza omukugu w'ebyobulimi oba abalimi abalina obumanyirivu, era wandiika ensigo, abakozi, amakungula, n'okutunda.

entries.question: Nkola ki obuwuka bwe bulumba ebirime?
entries.answer: Kebera ekirime bukyali, ggyamu ebirime ebyakosebwa ennyo bwe kiba kyetaagisa, kozesa ebikozesebwa ebiyonjo, era buuza omukugu w'ebyobulimi oba omutunzi w'eddagala omwesigwa nga tonnasira. Kozesa omuwendo ogutuufu era kuuma olususu, amaaso, n'emmere.

entries.question: Ntunda ntya ebintu byange ku mutimbagano?
entries.answer: Kozesa ebifaananyi ebitegeerekeka, okunnyonnyola okumpi, bbeeyi, obungi, ekifo, n'engeri y'okutuusa ekintu. Ddamu bakasitoma mangu, kakasa okusasulwa nga tonnatwala kintu, era wandiika buli oda omanye ebisinga okutunda.

entries.question: Bukugu bwa digital ki bwe nsaanidde okusooka okuyiga?
entries.answer: Tandika n'obukuumi bwa ssimu, okunoonyereza ku yintaneeti, okuwuliziganya ku WhatsApp oba email, okukuba ebifaananyi ebirungi, mobile money, n'okuwandiika ebiwandiiko ebyangu. Weegezeemu ekintu kimu buli lunaku okutuusa lwe kiba kyangu.

entries.question: Nteekateeka ntya okusaba omulimu?
entries.answer: Tegeka CV ennyimpi erimu erinnya lyo, ennamba ya ssimu, obukugu, emirimu gy'okoze, okutendekebwa, n'abayinza okukukakasa. Saba emirimu egikwatagana n'obukugu bwo, ddamu okwebuuza mu ngeri ey'obuntubulamu, era weeyongere okuyiga.

entries.question: Ddi lwe nsaanidde okunoonya omusawo?
entries.answer: Noonya obujjanjabi mangu bw'oba n'obulumi obw'amaanyi, okuvaamu omusaayi omungi, okuzibuwa okussa, ensonga z'olubuto, omwana anaafuye ennyo, oba obubonero obweyongera. Mu bulamu bwa buli lunaku, kozesa amazzi amayonjo, emmere ey'enjawulo, okuwummula, n'okufuna obujjanjabi bukyali.

entries.question: Nkola ki bwe mpulira situleesi oba nga siri mukuumi?
entries.answer: Yimiriramu, ssa omukka mpola, era yogera n'omuntu gwe weesiga. Bw'owulira nga toli mukuumi, genda mu kifo ekisinga obukuumi bwe kisoboka era tuukirira obuyambi obwesigika oba empeereza z'obudduukirize. Tosaanidde kukola kino wekka.

entries.question: Tuzimba tutya ekibiina ky'abakazi ekinywevu?
entries.answer: Mukkiriziganye ku kigendererwa ekitegeerekeka, amateeka amangu, ebiseera by'okusisinkana, obuvunaanyizibwa, n'ebiwandiiko eby'amazima. Tandika n'abantu abeesigika abatono, musalewo mu lwatu, era mwekebejje entambula buli kiseera buli omu awulire ng'alimu.
